title: malva rotundifolia var. henningii
intro: Malva rotundifolia var. henningii is a variant of the Malva rotundifolia plant, commonly known as the round-leaved mallow or marsh mallow. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and demulcent effects, making it useful for soothing irritated tissues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Malva rotundifolia var. henningii include its potential to relieve digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its ability to provide relief from coughs and colds due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Malva rotundifolia var. henningii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to calm skin irritations and promote wound healing.
